data.body: FOLLOW-UP (commit pending): scripts/probe-rebar.sh was a MISSED T2 target (scripts/ was outside the original grep scope) — it used --json at validate/ready/next-batch. Now migrated to --output + added probe coverage for -o/--output json|llm, short alias, equals form, and legacy-flag rejection. Probe 123/123. Also added docs/releasing.md step 5 (update local from channel + run live probe) per maintainer request.
